title: Connecting Canadian employers with international talent - Canada.ca
content:
## Connecting Canadian employers with international talent

## Join an international skills mission
We host small-scale targeted events to connect international talent with
- federal, provincial and territorial governments
- regional economic development agencies
By meeting directly with highly skilled talent abroad, we help employers in key Canadian industries
- fill critical skills gaps and labour shortages
- find the talent they need to grow and succeed.
Reach out to us if you need more information or want to join our next skills mission.
Our skills missions focus on key and emerging industries, including:
- STEM (science, technology, engineering, and mathematics)
- defence and cybersecurity, including shipbuilding and aerospace
- skilled trades to support infrastructure development, including critical minerals and mining

## Upcoming skills missions
Check back regularly for the next scheduled event.

## Past skills missions
An in-person event for aerospace professionals interested in opportunities to work in Canada.
Date: March 20 to 21, 2026
Location: Paris, France
An in-person event for French-speaking and bilingual professionals in construction and skilled trades interested in opportunities in Canada
Date: September 23 to 24, 2025
Location: Rabat, Morocco
An in-person event for information and communications technology professionals considering opportunities in Canada
Location : Sao Paulo, Brazil

## Hire permanent workers
Hire skilled foreign workers or tradespeople through Express Entry when you can’t find Canadians or permanent residents to fill jobs

### Atlantic Immigration Program
Become a designated employer and hire a skilled worker or international graduate

### Learn more about hiring a permanent worker from abroad
